title: Japanese Custard Baobing
description: A Japanese-inspired dessert that combines the traditional baobing flavors with a creamy custard filling.
instructions: 2. In a medium saucepan, combine the custard, qq, and bouncy. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
4. Pour the custard mixture into the baobing. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the custard is set.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
6. Serve chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of qq if desired.
